title: normania triphylla
intro: Normania triphylla, also known as Himalayan lavender, is a flowering plant native to the Himalayas and other parts of Asia. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Normania triphylla include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and soothing digestive issues. Normania triphylla can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or essential oil, making it a versatile and accessible natural remedy.
